message:
fix(codegen): Fix variable shadowing in array inline structs and try-in-defer

Array module:
- Rename parameter 'x' to '__val' in all array methods to avoid shadowing
- Rename parameter 'i' to '__idx' in insert/getitem/setitem methods
- Rename parameter 's' to '__bytes' in frombytes method
- Rename loop variables 'v', 'i', 'c' to '__v', '__i', '__cnt'
- Rename loop variable 'x' to '__item' in extend/fromlist methods

List module:
- Add inside_defer check to genPopUnknown to use 'catch unreachable'
  instead of 'try' when generating code inside defer blocks

These fixes prevent Zig compile errors when array structs are inlined
in contexts where variables like 'x', 's', 'i', 'v' already exist.
